page_metadata.biotools__summary: Comparative Structural Alignment (CSA) is a webserver for computing and comparing protein structure alignments. Different scoring schemes are used to compute score-optimal alignments. Input is two PDB files.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Comparative Structural Alignment (CSA) is a webserver for computing and comparing protein structure alignments. Different scoring schemes are used to compute score-optimal alignments. Input is two PDB files.
